meaning: n.<澳口>(颏上的)胡须 络腮胡子
examples: Meanwhile, a slew of managers, including Blackstone Group and Och-Ziff Capital Management, have raised new funds or reallocated money to buy mortgages and corporate loans on the cheap.
Last spring, when Internet stocks were sizzling, magazine publisher Ziff-Davis issued a tracker for its ZDNet Web division.
ZDNet investors don't hold a stake in the Web business, but in parent Ziff-Davis.
Representatives of Ziff Brothers, Jana, TPG-Axon, Jennison, UBS and Deutsche Bank declined to comment.
